title: Charles River's (CRL) Memphis Site Achieves Crucial Approval
text: Charles River (CRL) reaches an important milestone in cell therapy manufacturing collaboration with Vertex Pharmaceuticals.

title: Charles River and Vertex Pharmaceuticals Reach Important Milestone in Cell Therapy Manufacturing Collaboration
text: WILMINGTON, Mass. & MEMPHIS, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) today announced an important milestone in their strategic collaboration to manufacture CASGEVY™ (exagamglogene autotemcel [exa-cel]). CASGEVY is approved in some countries for certain eligible patients. The news follows Charles River's Memphis center of excellence passing back-to-back audits from both the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) and the Health Products Regulatory Autho.

title: Charles River (CRL) Expands 3D In Vitro Services Via New Deal
text: Charles River (CRL) finalizes agreement with service-based biotechnology company, CELLphenomics.

title: Charles River Finalizes Agreement with CELLphenomics, Expanding 3D In Vitro Services for Cancer Therapy Drug Screening
text: WILMINGTON, Mass. & BERLIN--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CRL #LIFEatCRL--Charles River expands portfolio of 3D in vitro testing services for oncology research with CELLphenomics' proprietary PD3D tumor model platform.

title: Investing in the Aging Population: 3 Healthcare Stocks to Watch
text: In 2016, there were 49 million Americans aged 65 or older. Analysts forecast that will grow to 73 million retirement-age Americans in 2030 and an eye-opening 95 million in the year 2060.
